❓ Frequently Asked Questions

Is my data safe when using Online Tools?

Absolutely. All processing happens locally in your browser. No data is sent to any server, so there's zero risk of data leaks. Your information stays completely under your control.

Does Online Tools upload my data to a server?

No. Online Tools uses client-side processing — everything runs in your browser. Your data never leaves your device, and the tool works even without an internet connection.

Are there any usage limits for Online Tools?

Online Tools has no usage limits — it's free and unlimited. Since processing is done client-side, speed depends on your device. For very large files, we recommend processing in batches for the best experience.

Is Online Tools free to use?

Yes, Online Tools is completely free to use. No registration or login required — all features are available immediately.

Can I use Online Tools on my phone?

Yes. Online Tools is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktops. The interface adapts automatically to your screen size.
